summary: Independent R2 QA accepts M7-TUTORIAL-HINTS-ENCYCLOPEDIA-COMPLETE-001. The prior P1 drift is fixed: the M7 guidance fixture is mechanically compared against accepted content-source/m7-beta-scenarios/beta-scenario-person-event-set.json, the runtime projection carries the accepted labels, review states, localization strings, known-gap count, and contracted counts, and UI continues to render only client read-model data without holding WorldState or duplicating authoritative sim rules.

tests_run.result: Changed paths are limited to allowed web, client-core, ui, Storybook, tests, task, message, route, goal-mode, model-routing, and thread-registry paths.

tests_run.command: git diff --name-only origin/main...HEAD -- pnpm-lock.yaml package.json packages/client-core/package.json packages/ui/package.json apps/web/package.json packages/content-schema/package.json packages/content-runtime/package.json
tests_run.result: No package manifest, package dependency, or pnpm-lock.yaml drift.

tests_run.command: git diff --name-only origin/main...HEAD -- packages/sim-core packages/sim-ai packages/protocol packages/save-format packages/map-renderer packages/platform packages/desktop tools .github docs PROJECT_STATUS.md MANIFEST.md SHA256SUMS.txt VALIDATION.md
tests_run.result: No forbidden desktop, sim, protocol, save, map, platform, tools, CI, docs gate, roadmap, risk/acceptance, PROJECT_STATUS, manifest, checksum, or validation-report drift.

tests_run.command: rg boundary scans over changed app/client/ui/test surfaces
tests_run.result: No new sim-core/sim-ai dependency, Node fs/Electron dependency in runtime UI/client code, WorldState storage, Math.random, Date.now, telemetry/account/cloud/server/multiplayer/release/branding/save migration implementation, or manual node battle implementation was found in the reviewed M7 surfaces.

Vitest passed: 1 file, 20 tests. The R2 guard directly compares the generated M7 guidance fixture with accepted content-source JSON and asserts the contracted 3 scenarios, 6 persons, 3 titles, 5 events, 36 localization records, 6 claims, 4 known gaps, HIST-M7-FILL-001-SCOPE INFERRED/HIGH, Forced movement and population-loss review, CULTURE_HUMAN_GATE_REQUIRED, Composite court broker 1531, and LANGUAGE_REVIEW_REQUIRED.
Vite web production build succeeded; existing chunk-size warning remains.
Storybook build succeeded; M7 normal, empty, error, extreme, and narrow stories are present.
Playwright Chromium passed: 13 tests, including M7 flow assertions and required viewport overflow coverage.
Prettier, ESLint, workspace typecheck, and architecture boundaries passed.
Only known unrelated untracked docs/M7_UI_Localization_Art_Handoff_Prompts.md remained before this QA R2 handoff file was added.

decisions.reason: R2 removes the stale UI-local M7 content pack and adds a discriminating source/fixture equality test plus targeted assertions for the prior drift.

The diff stays within allowed paths and does not touch pnpm-lock.yaml, package manifests, forbidden runtime packages, prior gate docs, roadmap, PROJECT_STATUS, release, branding, save migration, manual node battle, telemetry, accounts, cloud, server, or multiplayer scope.

M7 tutorial, hints, and encyclopedia are projected from client read models, reason codes, command previews, and content-record-shaped data. React stores only UI selection state and consumes ClientM7GuidanceReadModelSnapshot; it does not hold WorldState.

Player-facing M7 wording preserves accepted content labels and review states, keeps formal content lock not accepted, and exposes Human Gate / language-review states instead of presenting uncertain material as final certainty.
Storybook states cover normal, empty, error, extreme, and narrow cases; Playwright covers M7 flow content and viewport overflow across required desktop sizes.
Tests fail on accepted-source drift, claim label/confidence drift, reviewState drift, localization string drift, known-gap count drift, and contracted count drift.

risks.summary: packages/client-core/src/m7-beta-guidance-content.ts is a generated client fixture copied from accepted content-source JSON.
risks.mitigation: The client-core test compares it exactly to content-source/m7-beta-scenarios/beta-scenario-person-event-set.json so intentional content-source changes must be mechanically synced before tests pass.

risks.summary: The actual branch HEAD advanced from the routed writer head edc31aee to 318e6822 with route/status process files only.
risks.mitigation: The reviewed business fix remains commit 963bf558, and the current HEAD diff was included in scope checks.

risks.summary: Known unrelated untracked docs/M7_UI_Localization_Art_Handoff_Prompts.md remains in the worktree.
risks.mitigation: It was ignored and not modified.

requested_action: Accept the R2 QA verdict for M7-TUTORIAL-HINTS-ENCYCLOPEDIA-COMPLETE-001 and proceed with lead orchestration.
